description: Solana Breakpoint 2022 features discussions on integrating Web3 into daily life, blockchain technology, and real-world asset ownership. The event includes opportunities for community contributions to the agenda and insights into building a location layer on Solana.
topic_summary: The event covers the integration of blockchain technology with real-life applications, focusing on community engagement and the development of a spatial data registry for real-world assets on Solana [t=0:64-5:12].
